mapper.select: /* StockAccountHistoryMapper.getLatestStockSaleDate: 매매일지 최신 기준일 조회 */ SELECT MAX(REPLACE(H.SALE_DT, '-', '')) FROM MY_STOCK_SALE_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'

/* StockAccountHistoryMapper.getMonthlySaleAmountList: 계좌별 월간 매수/매도/순원금 합계 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN REPLACE(H.SALE_DT, '-', '') < '20260601' THEN 'BEFORE' ELSE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(H.SALE_DT, '-', ''), 1, 6) END AS MONTH_KEY , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN H.SALE_AMT > 0 THEN H.SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS BUY_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN H.SALE_AMT < 0 THEN ABS(H.SALE_AMT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SELL_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(H.SALE_AMT), 0) AS NET_SALE_AMT FROM MY_STOCK_SALE_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'
GROUP BY CASE WHEN REPLACE(H.SALE_DT, '-', '') < '20260601' THEN 'BEFORE' ELSE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(H.SALE_DT, '-', ''), 1, 6) END , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD ORDER BY H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD ASC , MONTH_KEY ASC

/* StockAccountHistoryMapper.getMonthlyCashAmountList: 계좌별 월간 입금/출금 합계 조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') < '20260601' THEN 'BEFORE' ELSE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', ''), 1, 6) END AS MONTH_KEY , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN H.CASH_IN_OUT_CD = 'CASH_IN_OUT_01' THEN ABS(H.CASH_AMT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DEPOSIT_AMT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN H.CASH_IN_OUT_CD = 'CASH_IN_OUT_02' THEN ABS(H.CASH_AMT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS WITHDRAW_AMT FROM MY_STOCK_ACCOUNT_CASH_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'
GROUP BY CASE WHEN REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') < '20260601' THEN 'BEFORE' ELSE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', ''), 1, 6) END , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD ORDER BY H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD ASC , MONTH_KEY ASC

/* StockAccountHistoryMapper.getStockAccountCheckRowList: 계좌 확인금액 원천 행 조회 */ SELECT H.STOCK_CHECK_SEQ , REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') AS CHECK_DT , CASE WHEN REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') < '20260601' THEN 'BEFORE' ELSE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', ''), 1, 6) END AS MONTH_KEY , H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD , H.STOCK_TOTAL_AMT FROM MY_STOCK_ACCOUNT_STOCK_CHECK H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD ASC , REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') ASC , H.STOCK_CHECK_SEQ ASC

/* StockAccountHistoryMapper.getDailySaleAmountList: 일자별 입출금 순원금 합계 조회 */ SELECT REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') AS SALE_DT , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN H.CASH_IN_OUT_CD = 'CASH_IN_OUT_01' THEN H.CASH_AMT WHEN H.CASH_IN_OUT_CD = 'CASH_IN_OUT_02' THEN -H.CASH_AMT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS NET_SALE_AMT FROM MY_STOCK_ACCOUNT_CASH_HISTORY H JOIN COMMON_CODE SA ON SA.GRP_CD = 'STOCK_ACCOUNT' AND SA.CD = H.STOCK_ACCOUNT_CD AND SA.USE_YN = 'Y'
GROUP BY REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') ORDER BY REPLACE(H.CASH_DT, '-', '') ASC
